name: Dorothy Vaughan
taglineCn: NASA第一位非裔美国管理者
bio: Dorothy Vaughan was a mathematician and NASA's first African-American manager. She led the West Area Computers, a group of African-American women mathematicians who performed complex calculations for the space program during the era of segregation. When electronic computers arrived, she taught herself and her team FORTRAN programming, ensuring they remained vital to NASA's operations. Her story was told in the book and film Hidden Figures.
bioCn: 多萝西·沃恩是一位数学家和NASA第一位非裔美国管理者。在种族隔离时代，她领导西区计算员——一群为太空项目进行复杂计算的非裔美国女数学家。当电子计算机到来时，她自学并教团队FORTRAN编程，确保她们对NASA的运营仍然至关重要。她的故事在书籍和电影《隐藏人物》中被讲述。
achievements: NASA's first African-American manager
Led West Area Computers group
Self-taught FORTRAN programming to adapt to electronic computers
achievementsCn: NASA第一位非裔美国管理者
领导西区计算员团队
自学FORTRAN编程以适应电子计算机
references: Shetterly, Margot Lee. Hidden Figures. William Morrow, 2016.

name: Annie Easley
tagline: NASA Computer Scientist and Rocket Pioneer
taglineCn: NASA计算机科学家和火箭先驱
bio: Annie Easley was an African-American computer scientist and mathematician who worked at NASA for 34 years. She developed and implemented code for the Centaur rocket stage, which launched the first missions to explore other planets. She also contributed to energy-conversion systems and battery technology that laid the groundwork for hybrid vehicles. Throughout her career, she faced racial discrimination but remained a fierce advocate for equal opportunity in STEM.
bioCn: 安妮·伊斯利是一位非裔美国计算机科学家和数学家，在NASA工作了34年。她为半人马座火箭级开发和实施了代码，该火箭发射了探索其他行星的第一批任务。她还为能量转换系统和电池技术做出了贡献，这为混合动力汽车奠定了基础。在她的整个职业生涯中，她面临种族歧视但始终是STEM领域机会平等的坚定倡导者。
achievements: Developed code for the Centaur rocket stage
Contributed to battery technology for hybrid vehicles
34-year career at NASA as a computer scientist
achievementsCn: 为半人马座火箭级开发代码
为混合动力汽车的电池技术做出贡献
在NASA担任34年计算机科学家
references: NASA Glenn Research Center oral history, 2001

name: Mary Allen Wilkes
bio: Mary Allen Wilkes was a pioneering computer programmer who became the first person to have a personal computer in her home. While working at MIT Lincoln Laboratory, she designed the operating system for the LINC, often considered the first minicomputer. In 1965, she took a LINC home to continue her work — years before personal computers existed commercially. She later became a lawyer, but her early work helped envision the personal computing revolution.
bioCn: 玛丽·艾伦·威尔克斯是一位开创性的计算机程序员，她成为第一个在家中拥有个人电脑的人。在MIT林肯实验室工作时，她为LINC设计了操作系统——LINC通常被认为是第一台小型计算机。1965年，她把一台LINC带回家继续工作——比个人电脑商业化早了好几年。她后来成为律师，但她的早期工作帮助构想了个人计算革命。
achievements: First person to use a computer at home (1965)
Designed the operating system for the LINC minicomputer
Pioneered the concept of personal computing
achievementsCn: 第一个在家使用电脑的人（1965年）
为LINC小型计算机设计操作系统
开创了个人计算的概念

name: Evelyn Boyd Granville
nameCn: 伊芙琳·博伊德·格兰维尔
tagline: Second African-American Woman to Earn a Math PhD
taglineCn: 第二位获得数学博士学位的非裔美国女性
bio: Evelyn Boyd Granville was the second African-American woman to receive a PhD in mathematics in the United States, earning her degree from Yale in 1949. She worked at IBM and later at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, where she developed computer programs for trajectory analysis during the Mercury and Apollo missions. She spent the latter part of her career teaching mathematics at universities, inspiring future generations.
bioCn: 伊芙琳·博伊德·格兰维尔是美国第二位获得数学博士学位的非裔美国女性，1949年从耶鲁大学获得学位。她在IBM和后来的NASA喷气推进实验室工作，在那里她为水星和阿波罗任务开发了轨迹分析计算机程序。她职业生涯的后期在大学教授数学，激励了未来的世代。
achievements: Second African-American woman with a math PhD from Yale (1949)
Developed trajectory programs for Mercury and Apollo missions
Taught mathematics at multiple universities
achievementsCn: 第二位从耶鲁获得数学博士的非裔美国女性（1949年）
为水星和阿波罗任务开发轨迹程序
在多所大学教授数学

name: Gladys West
bio: Gladys West was a mathematician whose work at the Naval Surface Warfare Center was critical to the development of the Global Positioning System (GPS). She programmed an IBM computer to deliver precise calculations for an accurate geodetic Earth model, which became the basis for GPS technology. Her contributions were unknown to the public for decades until she was inducted into the Air Force Space and Missile Pioneers Hall of Fame in 2018.
bioCn: 格拉迪丝·韦斯特是一位数学家，她在海军水面作战中心的工作对全球定位系统（GPS）的开发至关重要。她为IBM计算机编程，提供精确计算以建立准确的大地测量地球模型，这成为了GPS技术的基础。她的贡献在几十年里不为公众所知，直到2018年她入选空军太空和导弹先驱名人堂。
achievements: Mathematical modeling critical to GPS development
Inducted into Air Force Space and Missile Pioneers Hall of Fame
Programmed precise geodetic Earth model
achievementsCn: 对GPS开发至关重要的数学建模
入选空军太空和导弹先驱名人堂
编程精确的大地测量地球模型

name: Cynthia Breazeal
bio: Cynthia Breazeal is a roboticist and professor at MIT who pioneered the field of social robotics. She designed Kismet, one of the first robots capable of recognizing and simulating human emotions, and later created Jibo, described as the world's first social robot for the home. Her work explores how robots can interact with humans as collaborative partners rather than mere tools.
bioCn: 辛西娅·布雷齐尔是MIT的机器人学家和教授，开创了社交机器人领域。她设计了Kismet——第一批能够识别和模拟人类情感的机器人之一，后来又创造了Jibo——被描述为世界上第一个家用社交机器人。她的工作探索机器人如何作为协作伙伴而非仅仅是工具与人类互动。
achievements: Created Kismet, early robot recognizing human emotions
Developed Jibo, first social robot for the home
Pioneered human-robot interaction research at MIT
achievementsCn: 创造Kismet，早期识别人类情感的机器人
开发Jibo，第一个家用社交机器人
在MIT开创人机交互研究
references: Breazeal, C. Designing Sociable Robots. MIT Press, 2002.

name: Daphne Koller
bio: Daphne Koller is a computer scientist whose work on probabilistic graphical models and machine learning has shaped modern artificial intelligence. As a Stanford professor, she co-founded Coursera in 2012, democratizing education by making university-level courses available to millions worldwide for free. She was awarded the MacArthur Fellowship and is a member of the National Academy of Sciences. She later founded Insitro, applying machine learning to drug discovery.
bioCn: 达芙妮·科勒是一位计算机科学家，她在概率图模型和机器学习方面的工作塑造了现代人工智能。作为斯坦福教授，她于2012年联合创立Coursera，通过向全球数百万人免费提供大学级课程来实现教育民主化。她获得了麦克阿瑟奖并是国家科学院成员。她后来创立了Insitro，将机器学习应用于药物发现。
achievements: Co-founded Coursera, educating millions worldwide
MacArthur Fellowship recipient
Pioneer of probabilistic graphical models in AI
achievementsCn: 联合创立Coursera，教育全球数百万人
获得麦克阿瑟奖
AI概率图模型先驱

name: Joy Buolamwini
nationalityCn: 加纳裔加拿大裔美国人
bio: Joy Buolamwini is a computer scientist and digital activist who founded the Algorithmic Justice League after discovering significant racial and gender bias in commercial facial recognition systems. Her MIT research showed that facial analysis software from major tech companies had error rates up to 34% higher for darker-skinned women compared to lighter-skinned men. Her work has led to concrete policy changes and corporate accountability in AI development.
bioCn: 乔伊·布兰维尼是一位计算机科学家和数字活动家，在发现商业面部识别系统中存在严重的种族和性别偏见后，创立了算法正义联盟。她在MIT的研究表明，主要科技公司的面部分析软件对深肤色女性的错误率比浅肤色男性高出34%。她的工作促成了AI开发方面的具体政策变化和企业问责。
achievements: Founded the Algorithmic Justice League
Exposed racial and gender bias in AI facial recognition
Influenced policy changes in AI development
achievementsCn: 创立算法正义联盟
揭露AI面部识别中的种族和性别偏见
影响AI开发的政策变化
references: Buolamwini, J. & Gebru, T. 'Gender Shades,' Proceedings of Machine Learning Research, 2018.

name: Timnit Gebru
bio: Timnit Gebru is a computer scientist and advocate for ethical AI who co-founded Black in AI, a community of Black researchers in artificial intelligence. Her research highlighted the social and environmental costs of large language models and the disproportionate harm AI systems can cause to marginalized communities. She founded the Distributed AI Research Institute (DAIR) to conduct independent, community-rooted AI research.
bioCn: 蒂姆尼特·格布鲁是一位计算机科学家和AI伦理倡导者，她联合创立了Black in AI——一个人工智能领域黑人研究者社区。她的研究突出了大型语言模型的社会和环境成本，以及AI系统可能对边缘化社区造成的不成比例的伤害。她创立了分布式AI研究所（DAIR），进行独立的、以社区为根基的AI研究。
achievements: Co-founded Black in AI community
Founded Distributed AI Research Institute (DAIR)
Highlighted social costs of large language models
achievementsCn: 联合创立Black in AI社区
创立分布式AI研究所（DAIR）
突出大型语言模型的社会成本

name: Lisa Randall
taglineCn: 探索额外维度的理论物理学家
bio: Lisa Randall is a theoretical physicist at Harvard University whose work on particle physics and cosmology has proposed models involving extra dimensions of space. Her Randall-Sundrum model, developed with Raman Sundrum, suggests that our visible universe exists on a membrane within a higher-dimensional space. She is one of the most cited theoretical physicists in the world and has authored popular science books making complex physics accessible to general audiences.
bioCn: 丽莎·兰道尔是哈佛大学的理论物理学家，她在粒子物理学和宇宙学方面的工作提出了涉及空间额外维度的模型。她与拉曼·桑德鲁姆共同开发的兰道尔-桑德鲁姆模型表明，我们可见的宇宙存在于更高维空间中的一个膜上。她是世界上被引用最多的理论物理学家之一，还撰写了科普书籍，使复杂的物理学对普通读者变得易于理解。
achievements: Developed the Randall-Sundrum model of extra dimensions
Most cited theoretical physicist in the world
Best-selling author making physics accessible
achievementsCn: 开发兰道尔-桑德鲁姆额外维度模型
世界上被引用最多的理论物理学家
畅销书作者，使物理学变得易懂
references: Randall, L. Warped Passages. Ecco Press, 2005.

name: Daniela Rus
taglineCn: MIT计算机科学与人工智能实验室主任
bio: Daniela Rus is a Romanian-American roboticist and computer scientist who serves as director of MIT's Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory (CSAIL). Her research spans self-reconfiguring robots, autonomous vehicles, and soft robotics, creating machines that can change shape, swim, fly, and work alongside humans. She is a MacArthur Fellow and member of the National Academy of Engineering. Her vision of a future where robots seamlessly integrate into daily life drives one of the most prolific robotics research programs in the world.
bioCn: 达妮埃拉·鲁斯是一位罗马尼亚裔美国机器人学家和计算机科学家，担任MIT计算机科学与人工智能实验室（CSAIL）主任。她的研究涵盖自重构机器人、自动驾驶汽车和软体机器人，创造了能够变形、游泳、飞行并与人类协同工作的机器。她是麦克阿瑟奖获得者和美国国家工程院院士。她关于机器人无缝融入日常生活的愿景推动着世界上最高产的机器人研究项目之一。
achievements: Director of MIT CSAIL
Pioneered self-reconfiguring and soft robotics
MacArthur Fellow and National Academy of Engineering member
achievementsCn: MIT CSAIL主任
开创自重构和软体机器人研究
麦克阿瑟奖获得者和美国国家工程院院士

name: Latanya Sweeney
bio: Latanya Sweeney is a computer scientist and data privacy pioneer who demonstrated that 87% of Americans could be uniquely identified using just their ZIP code, birthdate, and sex. She developed the foundational concept of k-anonymity, a widely adopted technique for protecting individual privacy in released datasets. She was the first African American woman to earn a PhD in computer science from MIT. As a professor at Harvard, she continues to research the intersection of technology, policy, and privacy.
bioCn: 拉坦尼亚·斯威尼是一位计算机科学家和数据隐私研究先驱，她证明了仅凭邮政编码、出生日期和性别就可以唯一识别87%的美国人。她提出了k-匿名性的基础概念，这是一种被广泛采用的数据去标识化技术。她是第一位在MIT获得计算机科学博士学位的非裔美国女性。作为哈佛大学教授，她持续研究技术、政策与隐私的交叉领域。
achievements: Proved 87% of Americans identifiable by ZIP, birthdate, and sex
Developed foundational k-anonymity privacy concept
First African American woman with a CS PhD from MIT
achievementsCn: 证明87%的美国人可通过邮编、生日和性别被识别
提出基础性的k-匿名隐私概念
第一位在MIT获得计算机科学博士的非裔美国女性
references: Sweeney, L. 'k-anonymity: A model for protecting privacy,' International Journal of Uncertainty, Fuzziness and Knowledge-Based Systems, 2002.

name: Rana el Kaliouby
bio: Rana el Kaliouby is an Egyptian-American computer scientist who pioneered the field of emotion AI — technology that can read and respond to human emotions. She co-founded Affectiva, the first company to commercialize emotion recognition technology, with applications spanning healthcare, automotive safety, and market research. Her algorithms analyze facial expressions to detect nuanced emotional states in real time. She is the author of 'Girl Decoded' (2020) and serves as deputy CEO of Smart Eye.
bioCn: 拉娜·卡利乌比是一位埃及裔美国计算机科学家，开创了情感人工智能领域——能够读取和回应人类情感的技术。她联合创立了Affectiva，这是第一家将情感识别技术商业化的公司，应用覆盖医疗、汽车安全和市场研究等领域。她的算法可以实时分析面部表情以检测细微的情感状态。她是《Girl Decoded》（2020年）一书的作者，现任Smart Eye副首席执行官。
achievements: Co-founded Affectiva, first emotion AI company
Pioneered facial expression emotion recognition technology
Author of 'Girl Decoded' and deputy CEO of Smart Eye
achievementsCn: 联合创立第一家情感AI公司Affectiva
开创面部表情情感识别技术
《Girl Decoded》作者、Smart Eye副首席执行官
references: el Kaliouby, R. Girl Decoded. Currency, 2020.

name: Cathy O'Neil
bio: Cathy O'Neil is a mathematician and data scientist who became a leading voice for algorithmic accountability. Her bestselling book 'Weapons of Math Destruction' (2016) exposed how opaque big data algorithms can reinforce inequality and threaten democracy through biased decisions in areas like hiring, lending, and criminal justice. She founded ORCAA, an algorithmic auditing company that helps organizations identify and correct bias in their models. She previously worked as a quantitative analyst at the hedge fund D.E. Shaw.
bioCn: 凯西·奥尼尔是一位数学家和数据科学家，成为算法问责领域的领军人物。她的畅销书《数学杀伤性武器》（2016年）揭露了不透明的大数据算法如何在招聘、贷款和刑事司法等领域通过有偏见的决策加剧不平等并威胁民主。她创立了ORCAA——一家算法审计公司，帮助组织识别和纠正模型中的偏差。她此前曾在对冲基金D.E. Shaw担任量化分析师。
achievements: Author of bestselling 'Weapons of Math Destruction' (2016)
Founded ORCAA algorithmic auditing company
Leading voice for algorithmic accountability and fairness
achievementsCn: 畅销书《数学杀伤性武器》作者（2016年）
创立ORCAA算法审计公司
算法问责与公平的领军人物
references: O'Neil, C. Weapons of Math Destruction. Crown, 2016.

name: Ayanna Howard
taglineCn: 推进人机交互的机器人学家
bio: Ayanna Howard is a roboticist and AI researcher who specializes in human-robot interaction and assistive robotics. She worked at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory developing autonomous navigation systems for Mars rovers. As dean of the College of Engineering at Ohio State University, she is one of the highest-ranking African American women in engineering academia. Her research focuses on developing robots that can assist children with disabilities and on understanding how humans develop trust in autonomous systems.
bioCn: 阿雅娜·霍华德是一位机器人学家和人工智能研究者，专注于人机交互和辅助机器人技术。她曾在NASA喷气推进实验室为火星探测器开发自主导航系统。作为俄亥俄州立大学工程学院院长，她是工程学术界职位最高的非裔美国女性之一。她的研究致力于开发能够帮助残障儿童的机器人，以及理解人类如何对自主系统建立信任。
achievements: Developed Mars rover autonomy at NASA JPL
Dean of Engineering at Ohio State University
Pioneer in assistive robotics for children with disabilities
achievementsCn: 在NASA喷气推进实验室开发火星车自主系统
俄亥俄州立大学工程学院院长
残障儿童辅助机器人技术先驱
references: Ohio State University College of Engineering — https://engineering.osu.edu/

name: Margaret Dayhoff
bio: Margaret Dayhoff was a pioneer of bioinformatics who created the Atlas of Protein Sequence and Structure, the first comprehensive collection of protein sequences. She developed the PAM (Point Accepted Mutation) substitution matrices, which are still widely used in sequence alignment algorithms today. She established the first protein sequence database, a precursor to modern bioinformatics resources like GenBank and UniProt. Her work laid the computational foundations for the field of molecular evolution.
bioCn: 玛格丽特·戴霍夫是生物信息学先驱，创建了《蛋白质序列与结构图谱》——第一部全面的蛋白质序列集。她开发了PAM（点接受突变）替代矩阵，至今仍广泛用于序列比对算法。她建立了第一个蛋白质序列数据库，是GenBank和UniProt等现代生物信息学资源的前身。她的工作为分子进化领域奠定了计算基础。
achievements: Created the Atlas of Protein Sequence and Structure
Developed PAM substitution matrices still used today
Established the first protein sequence database
achievementsCn: 创建《蛋白质序列与结构图谱》
开发至今仍在使用的PAM替代矩阵
建立第一个蛋白质序列数据库

name: Mary Eleanor Spear
bio: Mary Eleanor Spear was a pioneer of data visualization who worked at the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics for decades. She authored 'Charting Statistics' (1952) and 'Practical Charting Techniques' (1969), foundational texts that established standards for clear and effective statistical graphics. Her principles for honest visual communication of data — including guidelines on scales, labeling, and chart selection — continue to influence modern data visualization practice.
bioCn: 玛丽·埃莉诺·斯皮尔是数据可视化先驱，在美国劳工统计局工作了数十年。她撰写了《统计图表法》（1952年）和《实用图表技术》（1969年），这两本奠基性著作确立了清晰有效的统计图表标准。她关于数据诚实视觉传达的原则——包括刻度、标注和图表选择的指南——至今仍影响着现代数据可视化实践。
achievements: Authored foundational texts on statistical charting
Established standards for data visualization at the Bureau of Labor Statistics
Principles still influence modern data visualization practice
achievementsCn: 撰写统计图表领域的奠基性著作
在劳工统计局建立数据可视化标准
原则至今影响着现代数据可视化实践

name: Rediet Abebe
taglineCn: 致力于社会公益的算法研究者
bio: Rediet Abebe is a computer scientist working at the intersection of algorithms, AI, and social good. She co-founded Mechanism Design for Social Good (MD4SG), a multi-institutional initiative that uses computational techniques to address inequality and social challenges. She was a Harvard Society of Fellows member and became the first Black woman to earn a computer science PhD from Cornell University. She is an assistant professor at UC Berkeley, advancing research on how algorithms can promote equity.
bioCn: 雷迪特·阿贝贝是一位在算法、人工智能与社会公益交叉领域工作的计算机科学家。她联合创立了面向社会公益的机制设计（MD4SG）——一项利用计算技术解决不平等和社会挑战的多机构倡议。她是哈佛学会会员，也是首位在康奈尔大学获得计算机科学博士学位的黑人女性。她是加州大学伯克利分校助理教授，致力于研究算法如何促进公平。
achievements: Co-founded Mechanism Design for Social Good (MD4SG)
First Black woman to earn a CS PhD from Cornell
Harvard Society of Fellows member and UC Berkeley professor
achievementsCn: 联合创立面向社会公益的机制设计（MD4SG）
首位在康奈尔大学获得计算机科学博士的黑人女性
哈佛学会会员和加州大学伯克利分校教授

name: Corinna Cortes
taglineCn: 支持向量机共同发明者
bio: Corinna Cortes is a computer scientist and VP of Google Research who co-invented Support Vector Machines (SVM) with Vladimir Vapnik, one of the most widely used machine learning algorithms. Her 1995 SVM paper is among the most cited in all of computer science. Her work at AT&T Bell Labs and subsequently at Google has advanced the fields of machine learning, computational learning theory, and large-scale data mining.
bioCn: 科琳娜·科尔特斯是一位计算机科学家和谷歌研究副总裁，她与弗拉基米尔·瓦普尼克共同发明了支持向量机（SVM）——最广泛使用的机器学习算法之一。她1995年的SVM论文是整个计算机科学领域被引用最多的论文之一。她在AT&T贝尔实验室和之后在谷歌的工作推动了机器学习、计算学习理论和大规模数据挖掘领域的发展。
achievements: Co-invented Support Vector Machines (SVM) with Vapnik
1995 SVM paper among most cited in computer science
VP of Google Research
achievementsCn: 与瓦普尼克共同发明支持向量机（SVM）
1995年SVM论文是计算机科学领域被引用最多的论文之一
谷歌研究副总裁
references: Cortes, C. & Vapnik, V. 'Support-Vector Networks,' Machine Learning, 1995.

name: Dorothy Denning
bio: Dorothy Denning is a cybersecurity pioneer who created the first intrusion detection model in 1987, laying the foundation for modern network security systems. She is a professor at Georgetown University and a Fellow of the ACM. Her book 'Information Warfare and Security' is a foundational text in the field. Her work spans cryptography, information security, and cyber conflict, and she has been instrumental in shaping cybersecurity policy and education.
bioCn: 多萝西·丹宁是网络安全先驱，1987年创建了第一个入侵检测模型，为现代网络安全系统奠定了基础。她是乔治城大学教授和ACM会士。她的著作《信息战争与安全》是该领域的奠基性文献。她的研究涵盖密码学、信息安全和网络冲突，在塑造网络安全政策和教育方面发挥了重要作用。
achievements: Created the first intrusion detection model (1987)
Fellow of the ACM
Authored foundational text 'Information Warfare and Security'
achievementsCn: 创建第一个入侵检测模型（1987年）
ACM会士
撰写奠基性著作《信息战争与安全》
references: Denning, D.E. 'An Intrusion-Detection Model,' IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering, 1987.
